title: Transfer Portability Deck
concept: A dense command deck that treats browser save, local directory save, GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle actions as related operational transfers while keeping the live WordPress shell protected.
focus: dense command deck for power users
distinct browser and local-directory save consequences
stateful settings reload and destructive delete flows
flows: Finish settings Save & Reload end to end for a stored Playground: change WordPress version, PHP version, language, network, and multisite controls, save settings, reload the runtime, update the shell badge, and append transfer history.
Show the unsaved reset warning for temporary Playgrounds, then confirm the destructive Apply Settings & Reset flow with progress and final runtime state.
Delete a saved Playground end to end with warning, cancel support, confirmation, row removal, transfer history, and active-site fallback to an Unsaved Playground.
Save to browser storage or a local directory with distinct destination copy, permission consequence, file-copy progress, active identity mutation, saved row state, and history result.
Launch or import through Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import with account connection, Blueprint URL, and .zip import with validation and replacement warning.
Use Site Manager tabs for Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, and Logs while the active WordPress preview stays visible.
Run portability transfers for Export to GitHub, Download as zip, Import zip, Download database.sqlite, Copy or Download Blueprint bundle, and Run Blueprint with visible result states.
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start
WordPress PR preview with PR number or URL
Gutenberg PR or branch preview with branch input
GitHub import with account connection and non-persistent token caveat
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with validation and replacement warning
Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest representative subset of 43
Featured Blueprint shortcuts and selected Blueprint detail
Save in this browser
Save to a local directory
Save progress with file-copy counts
Saved and unsaved Playground list
Local-directory storage distinction and reconnect consequence
Open, rename, delete, and manage saved Playgrounds
Delete confirmation with cancel, progress, final row removal, and active fallback
URL path input and refresh
Homepage and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, saved, and local shell states
WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network, and multisite settings
Unsaved destructive reset warning and stored Save & Reload behavior
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty state, and save result
Blueprint editor with URL, validation, copy, download, run, warning, progress, and result state
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with realistic warning state
Export to GitHub
Download as .zip
Database download
Blueprint bundle copy, download, and run actions
Transfer history for saves, reloads, imports, exports, downloads, file edits, deletes, and Blueprint runs
